title: ATM : All Tech Mods
description: TECH MODPACK ADAPTED FOR LOW-END PCS
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64de6603e063a64f488ee6bba95cf34bbf04b41f_0.webp)

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/MINECRAFT_JAVA_EDITION-1.21.1-97ca00?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555) ![RAM](https://img.shields.io/badge/MINIMUM_RAM-8GB-97ca00?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555) ![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEOFORGE-EDITION-97ca00?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555)
# **FEATURES**

✔️ Full Customization

✔️ 100+ Mods

✔️ Overhauled World Generation (OTBWHG)

✔️ Shader Support

✔️ Compatible with Low-end pc

✔️ New Machines and Tech Stuff

✔️ Max Optimization

✔️ Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features

✔️ Many Custom Features and Improved Performance


# What is this modpack?
This modpack is a Easy and Userfriendly modpack super optimized for low-end pc managing to run on a 8GB RAM Chromebook!

# What this modpack offer?
It offers really good mods that help making the vanilla game better and adding more thing to the basic game

# Why should i install this modpack?
You should install this for the optimized look and the amount of things in it

# It is free?
Yeah its free without even spending a penny, all the things in this modpack are free

# What are the primary mods?
